parameters.query: INSERT INTO eventos_detectados (tipo, descripcion, detalle, notificado) VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, TRUE);

WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO events_inbox (
    event_id, source, event_type, external_id, occurred_at, correlation_id,
    actor, entity_type, entity_id, repo, trello_card_id, pull_request_number, commit_sha,
    payload, normalized, processing_status
  ) VALUES (
    $1, $2, $3, $4, $5::timestamptz, $6,
    $7, $8, $9, $10, $11, $12, $13,
    $14::jsonb, $15::jsonb, 'ingested'
  )
  ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING event_id, correlation_id
)
SELECT
  EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM ins) AS inserted,
  COALESCE((SELECT event_id FROM ins LIMIT 1), $1) AS event_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT correlation_id FROM ins LIMIT 1), $6) AS correlation_id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $json.event_id, $json.source, $json.tipo, $json.external_id, $json.occurred_at, $json.correlation_id, $json.actor || null, $json.entity_type || null, $json.entity_id || null, $json.repo || null, $json.trello_card_id || null, $json.pull_request_number || null, $json.commit_sha || null, $json.raw_payload_json || '{}', $json.normalized_json || '{}' ] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_runs_audit (workflow_id, workflow_name, status, completed_at, correlation_id, metrics) VALUES ($1, $2, 'success', NOW(), $3, $4::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $workflow.id || 'unknown', $workflow.name, $json.correlation_id || null, JSON.stringify({ event_id: $json.event_id || null, source: $json.source || null, event_type: $json.tipo || $json.event_type || null }) ] }}
